Embed validation: a pattern without all: drops layouts, a pattern not
covering dir= loads an empty tree, and a missing go:embed leaves the FS
empty - all rejected at generation time.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/templates.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed templates
var Templates embed.FS

//fabrik:templates dir=views
//go:embed all:templates
var Views embed.FS

//fabrik:templates
var Empty embed.FS
-- web/templates/note.txt --
placeholder so the plain pattern embeds something
-- web/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html>{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</html>
-- web/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}ok{{ end }}
-- want/diags --
error: web/templates.go:5:1: the go:embed pattern does not cover all:templates
  help: use //go:embed all:templates - plain patterns drop _-prefixed files, other directories load an empty tree
error: web/templates.go:9:1: the go:embed pattern does not cover all:views
  help: use //go:embed all:views - plain patterns drop _-prefixed files, other directories load an empty tree
error: web/templates.go:13:1: //fabrik:templates variable has no //go:embed
  help: add //go:embed all:templates above the variable
